Flavor_Text: Authorizes operations beyond standard Part 107 limitations including night flight and flight over people.
Only aircraft on the Department of Defense Blue UAS list may be used for federal contracts requiring data security.
Automated airspace authorization for operations in controlled airspace below 400 feet AGL.
Specialized ground support equipment for operations in remote, rugged, or waterlogged terrain.
Captures data across multiple wavelengths for crop health, environmental, and scientific analysis.
Trained ground crew maintaining unaided visual contact with the aircraft during operations beyond pilot line of sight.
